---
title: "The Visibility and Communication of Cohesion Policy in Online Media"
author: "Mendez, C., Triga, V., Bachtler, J., Djouvas, C., Mendez, F. and Stier, S."
date: 2019-06-01
description: "Report"
categories:
  [Media and Social Media Monitoring, Public Opinion and Argument Mining]
image: images_publications/cohesion-online.png
---
